verdict_reasoning: SRC is a non-receptor tyrosine kinase canonically anchored to the inner leaflet of the PM via N-terminal myristoylation, making it cytoplasmic-facing at baseline. However, ecto-SRC / surface-displayed active SRC has been documented on tumor cells and during oncogenic transformation, consistent with the broader cancer ecto-kinase phenomenon. This non-baseline outer-leaflet pool on transformed cells qualifies as contextual surface accessibility, not no.
